display.purpose: Page titles, dashboard main headings. One per screen.

title.purpose: Card titles, table column headers, form section labels.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, sidebar expand).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, nav item hover, badge state changes.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.note: Sidebar switches from mobile sheet to desktop collapsed strip.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Commitment Violet, used for primary CTAs like 'Adicionar lançamento'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: oklch(0.52 0.233 277); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.44 0.233 277); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.233 277); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary/cancel action. Transparent background, muted text, light violet tint on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: transparent; color: oklch(0.50 0 0); font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: oklch(0.94 0.01 277); color: oklch(0.14 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.52 0.233 277); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Summary Card
components.description: Dashboard metric card. Label + semantic-colored figure. The signature financial primitive.
components.html:
Receitas do mês
R$ 4.200,00
components.css: .ds-summary-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; background-color: oklch(1 0 0); border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.14 0 0 / 10%); } .ds-summary-card__header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-bottom: 4px; } .ds-summary-card__label { font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.50 0 0); } .ds-summary-card__icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-summary-card__icon--receita { color: oklch(0.60 0.17 162); } .ds-summary-card__icon--despesa { color: oklch(0.55 0.246 16); } .ds-summary-card__icon--balance { color: oklch(0.52 0.233 277); } .ds-summary-card__value { font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-summary-card__value--receita { color: oklch(0.60 0.17 162); } .ds-summary-card__value--despesa { color: oklch(0.55 0.246 16); } .ds-summary-card__value--balance { color: oklch(0.52 0.233 277); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input. 1px hairline border, violet focus ring, no shadow at rest.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field__label { font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.14 0 0); } .ds-input { font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.14 0 0); background-color: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.90 0 0); border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 12px; width: 100%; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.50 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.52 0.233 277); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.233 277 / 50%); }

components.name: Nav Items
components.description: Sidebar navigation links. Active = violet fill. Default = muted text, light violet tint on hover.
components.html: DashboardLança­mentosRelatórios
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav__item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.50 0 0); transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav__item:hover { background-color: oklch(0.94 0.01 277); color: oklch(0.14 0 0); } .ds-nav__item--active { background-color: oklch(0.52 0.233 277); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); } .ds-nav__item--active:hover { background-color: oklch(0.52 0.233 277); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); }

components.name: Semantic Badges
components.description: Receita / Despesa / Pendente status badges. Tinted background, dark semantic text, pill shape.
components.html: RECEITADESPESAPENDENTE
components.css: .ds-badges-demo { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.03em; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 0.375rem; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge--receita { background-color: oklch(0.93 0.04 162); color: oklch(0.35 0.17 162); } .ds-badge--despesa { background-color: oklch(0.94 0.04 16); color: oklch(0.38 0.246 16); } .ds-badge--pendente { background-color: oklch(0.95 0.04 85); color: oklch(0.45 0.12 85); }

narrative.overview:
The design system is built on a single principle: surfaces reveal exactly what the numbers are. Nothing competes with the data. No shadows assert hierarchy over figures. No gradient accents distract from whether the month ended positive or negative. The interface is transparent — not blank, but deliberately clear, the way good glass is clear: you notice what's through it, not the glass itself.

The Glass Account is restrained by design, not by default. Commitment Violet is the sole expressive brand color; the entire surrounding palette stays neutral so it lands. Steady Emerald and Honest Ember carry chromatic weight because they carry financial meaning — income and expense, respectively. Everything else steps back.

This system explicitly rejects: generic SaaS cream backgrounds and hero-metric cards; corporate banking navy and gold; startup dashboard purple gradients and glassmorphism; spreadsheet grey-on-grey with no visual hierarchy.
keyCharacteristics: Flat tonal elevation — background, card, and sidebar differentiated by lightness only, no shadows
Semantic color as the only accent — emerald for income, ember for expense, violet for the brand
Typographic hierarchy through weight and size, not color or ornament
Ring-boundary cards instead of shadowed cards
Full dark-mode support for every surface and semantic token

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Steady Emerald means income. Honest Ember means expense. These two colors carry their meaning everywhere they appear. They are never used decoratively.

rules.name: The Violet Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Commitment Violet appears on ≤15% of any given screen. It is reserved for: one active nav item, primary action buttons, focus rings, and positive balance values.

rules.name: The One-Font Rule
rules.body: Geist Sans is the only typeface. Hierarchy comes from weight (400/500/600/700) and size — never from introducing a second family.

rules.name: The Weight Rule
rules.body: Four weights in use: 400, 500, 600, 700. Do not use 300 or intermediate weights like 450.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: box-shadow is prohibited at rest. The ring boundary conveys the card edge; background tonal steps convey surface hierarchy.

dos: Do render all income figures and icons in Steady Emerald (oklch(0.60 0.17 162))
Do render all expense figures and icons in Honest Ember (oklch(0.55 0.246 16))
Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 as the card boundary — no border, no box-shadow
Do differentiate surfaces using background tokens: background → card-surface → sidebar
Do support dark mode for every new component
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3 headings
donts: Don't use cream, sand, beige, or warm-tinted backgrounds
Don't add box-shadow to cards, inputs, or buttons at rest
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) as a card or panel style
Don't build identical icon + heading + text card grids
Don't use Commitment Violet on chrome that carries no semantic or interactive meaning
Don't use border-left wider than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrow labels above section headings
Don't use navy + gold or any bank-palette color alongside the violet primary
Don't introduce a second brand accent without resolving it against Commitment Violet
